strengths: Direct, recent production experience building AI-agent infrastructure, MCP code generators, and frameworks supporting agentic workflows at re:cinq.
Exceptional backend architecture expertise, evidenced by designing event-driven platforms and microservices handling millions of requests per second at Dunnhumby.
Relevant fintech and high-stakes commercial exposure, including reshaping investment practices at RIDE Capital and building complex pricing engines at Optilyz.
concerns: Lacks demonstrated executive-level engineering management experience, specifically the hard requirement of scaling teams from 10 to 30+ people.
No explicit evidence of structuring governance frameworks for outsourced engineering or managing hybrid delivery models.
While experienced in fintech, the resume lacks direct mentions of architecting real-time credit-risk assessment or algorithmic working-capital allocation.
response.justification: Bogdan presents a highly compelling technical foundation for this role, uniquely blending direct production experience in AI-agent infrastructure with deep expertise in high-throughput distributed systems. His recent work building agentic frameworks and MCP code generators directly addresses the core AI architecture requirements, while his background engineering microservices that process millions of requests per second proves his capability to handle real-time, low-latency financial infrastructure. Although his background highlights Staff-level technical leadership and open-source founding rather than traditional executive team scaling, his profound architectural fluency in the exact intersection of agentic AI and event-driven backends makes him a highly defensible, high-upside candidate perfectly suited to drive the company's technical vision.
